subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God in London! Know ye that He Who hath come hath fulfilled His promise and manifested His Cause, and passeth among you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله فی لندره اعلموا من ذهب اتی انه انجز وعده و اظهر امره و یمر علیکم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @proclamation to the people of the world, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
